positive: A vibrant, symmetrical stylized botanical pattern featuring glowing bioluminescent deep-sea flora and tropical leaves. The composition is centered and highly detailed, suitable for seamless apparel printing. Use a strong contrast between luminous cyan, electric teal, deep indigo, and pops of magenta. The style should be graphic, inspired by Art Nouveau meets sci-fi illustration, with crisp, clean silhouettes and intricate linework. The lighting is dramatic, emanating from within the flora itself, casting ethereal glow and deep shadows. Studio quality, vector art precision, high contrast, perfect for screen printing.
negative: blurry, deformed, ugly, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, low detail, amateur, text, logo, watermark, noise, jpeg artifacts, signature, messy, gradients, poor composition
